info.name: Loan Ledger
info.summary: Mortgage and loan dashboard backed by human-readable YAML files.
info.description:
Loan Ledger reads `.loan.yaml` files from a folder you choose (default: `/Ledgers/`) and renders an interactive amortization, scenario, and payment-tracking UI.
Files stay as plain YAML in your Nextcloud, so you can hand-edit them, version them in git, and share them with collaborators using normal Nextcloud sharing. All loan math runs entirely in your browser; the server only reads and writes the underlying files.
info.author: Carlos Asmat
